actor.UMS+CMS+Auth0: ACTOR: UMS.getProfileById (Sheet2 #9) → actor.enrichedSnapshot.user.profile; UMS.getRoleById (#10) → user.role; UMS.getTeamsByIds (#11) → user.teams[]; CMS.getCustomerById (#13) → actor.enrichedSnapshot.customer; Auth0 M2M token (#19) for profile picture enrichment

subject.--: SUBJECT: no external API — raw subject only (no subject.enrichedSnapshot)
subject.-- (local): SUBJECT: built from raw subject fields only (no HTTP probe)
subject.-- (local IDs): SUBJECT: pass-through IDs from raw envelope (no subject.enrichedSnapshot)
subject.D: styles(familyIds) + variations(family: SUBJECT: D.fetchStylesByFamilyIds (#1) + D.fetchVariationsByFamilyIds (#7) → merged → subject.enrichedSnapshot.fontDetails[{family, styles[], variations[]}]
subject.D: variations(md5s) → styles(derived): SUBJECT: D.fetchVariationsByMd5s (#6) → derive styleIds → D.fetchStylesByIds (#2) → subject.enrichedSnapshot.fontDetails
subject.D: variations(variationIds): SUBJECT: D.fetchVariationsByMd5s (#6) or style-scoped fetch → subject.enrichedSnapshot.fontDetails
subject.AMS: project+sharing+rootAncestor; D: st: SUBJECT: AMS.getAssetById (#15, projectId) → subject.enrichedSnapshot.asset (name, metadata, accessIds, isShared, rootAncestorAssetId/Type); AMS.getAssetSharingDetails (#16) → sharingInfo[]; D.fetchStylesByFamilyIds/ByIds (#1/#2) + D.fetchVariationsByMd5s (#6) → fontDetails[]
subject.AMS: project+sharing+rootAncestor: SUBJECT: AMS.getAssetById (#15) → subject.enrichedSnapshot.asset incl. rootAncestor fields; AMS.getAssetSharingDetails (#16) → sharingInfo[]
subject.AMS: asset+sharing+rootAncestor; D: styl: SUBJECT: AMS.getAssetById (#15) → subject.enrichedSnapshot.asset; AMS.getAssetSharingDetails (#16) → sharingInfo[]; D styles+variations → fontDetails[] (when style/family IDs present)
subject.AMS: asset+sharing; D: styles(list)+vari: SUBJECT: AMS.getAssetById (#15) → asset; AMS.getAssetSharingDetails (#16) → sharingInfo; D.fetchStylesByListIds (#3) + D.fetchVariationsByMd5s (#6) → fontDetails
subject.UMS: profile+role+teams: SUBJECT: UMS.getProfileById (#9) → subject.enrichedSnapshot.profile; UMS.getRoleById (#10) → profile.role; UMS.getTeamsByIds (#11) → profile.teams[]
subject.UMS: getProfilesByIds (optional): SUBJECT: UMS.getProfileById (#9) per subject user id → subject.enrichedSnapshot.profiles[] or profile
subject.UMS: getInvitationById × N: SUBJECT: UMS.getInvitationById (#12) per invitation id → subject.enrichedSnapshot.invitations[]
subject.BYOF: getContractById; D: styles+variati: SUBJECT: BYOF.getContractById (#18) → subject.enrichedSnapshot.contract + styles; D.fetchStylesByIds (#2) + D.fetchVariationsByMd5s (#6) → fontDetails
subject.BYOF+D: SUBJECT: BYOF.getContractById (#18) + Discovery style/variation fetch → subject.enrichedSnapshot (contract + fontDetails)

api_json_paths.getAssetById: subject.enrichedSnapshot.asset (id, name, metadata, accessIds, isShared, rootAncestor*)
api_json_paths.getDiscoveryToken (M2M): Auth header for Discovery/UMS calls; enriches actor.enrichedSnapshot.user.profile.profilePicture
